channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: Middle East Cyber Battle Field Broadens — Especially in UAE
item.description: As the war with Iran continues, breach attempts targeting the United Arab Emirates tripled in a few weeks — many targeting critical infrastructure....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: North Korea terror victims escalate fight to seize $71 million from Aave hack
item.description: In a 30-page response filed Tuesday, attorneys for victims of three North Korea terrorism cases reframed the April 18 Aave hack as fraud rather than theft — a distinction that could give the attackers...
item.dc:creator: Coindesk

item.description: Price compression near $1.42 comes as analysts point to a repeating bull flag structure and thinning liquidity conditions....

item.title: Bitcoin tops $81,000 as Strategy mulls selling its BTC to fund dividend obligations

item.title: New stealthy Quasar Linux malware targets software developers
